metadata.description: Reference implementation of the Classroom convention: a Claude-native skill marketplace organized by problem domain, with a Guide that helps non-technical users discover, install, and extend skills.

plugins.name: competitive-intelligence
plugins.description: Skills for analyzing competitors, their messaging, pricing, and product moves.

plugins.name: customer-research
plugins.description: Skills for preparing for customer interviews, synthesizing feedback, and building personas.

plugins.name: ops-essentials
plugins.description: Skills every operator needs: weekly status updates, meeting prep, async standups.

plugins.name: sales-enablement
plugins.description: Skills for sales: stakeholder follow-ups, deal reviews, account research.
